form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Last start won by 1.75 len at this track March 16 over 1000m defeating Merodaque carrying 55kg at $4.70. The run before that 4th of 11 at this track on March 2 over 1000m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Admiral Speed with 55kg at $7.80. Won?t spend a penny in the run from the inside barrier. Good each-way hope.
